info.title: DatabaseManager
info.description:
Copyright (C) 2026 Logic Software, Inc.
runscript         runs specified sql script
run-migrations    runs database migration on specified database
help              Display more information on a specific command.
version           Display version information.

options.name: --param
options.description:
Parameter for script in format 'name:value'. For
example -p addDemoData:1

options.name: --connection-string
options.description: Required. Connection strings to the target database

options.name: --database
options.description:
Allows to override target database from
connection-string

commands.name: run-migrations
commands.description: runs database migration on specified database

options.name: --migrations
options.description: Required. Directory that contains sql migrations.

options.name: --target-version
options.description:
Target db version.If not specified then database
will be migrated to the latest version.Example:
10.2.3.5

options.name: --connection-string
options.description: Required. Connection strings to the target database

options.name: --database
options.description:
Allows to override target database from
connection-string

commands.name: help
commands.description: Display more information on a specific command.
